content.en:
The inheritance of the Ultimate Realm Lord is extremely precious, and in the Void Heaven Palace, an Ultimate Realm Lord inheritance requires one million contribution points.

Even if it is a Ninth Realm peak existence like the Void Immortal Realm Lord, it can't be exchanged.

But Ye Tian could afford it.

He immediately went to Lord Duomi, and spent one million contribution points to exchange for an Ultimate Realm Lord Inheritance.

......

Inside the Void Heaven Palace.

Ye Tian was receiving the Ultimate Realm Lord inheritance, and time was slowly passing.

It was a long time before he received the complete Ultimate Realm Lord inheritance.

And after accepting the inheritance, he realized how far he was from the Ultimate Realm Lord~ how big it was.

If you want to become the Ultimate Realm Master, you must comprehend the Supreme Dimension Rules to the three hundred and sixty-five levels, and then comprehend the Ultimate Dimension Rules-.

Comprehending the rules of the ultimate dimension is one of the conditions for becoming the master of the ultimate realm.

The second condition is to complete the cultivation of the Ultimate Body, and Ye Tian's Ultimate Body is just getting started.

The third condition is that the ultimate will must meet a certain standard, and he is far from it.

Even if these conditions are met, the probability of impacting the Ultimate Realm Lord is still nine deaths.

The key is that if you hit the main realm of the Ultimate Realm, once you fail, you will be directly wiped out by a force, and no matter how many clones you have, you can't do it.

If you can't break through, you're dead!

Therefore, very few Ninth Realm Peaks dared to attack the Ultimate Realm Lord, unless they had really lived too long and wanted to try it.

The inheritance of the Ultimate Realm Lord is naturally not only about these introductions, but also involves a lot of knowledge, the experience of creating the ultimate dimension killing moves, etc., and how to practice.

After obtaining this inheritance, Ye Tian at least no longer had doubts about the road ahead.

"According to the inheritance, the peak of the Nine Realms has mastered one or two ultimate dimensional killing moves, and this is just the beginning, and some powerful Nine Realms peak powerhouses have mastered nine or even more ultimate dimensional killing moves. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the Sea of Dimensions, the most powerful batch of Nine Realms pinnacles are existences that have comprehended the rules of the ultimate dimension and mastered many kinds of ultimate dimensional killing moves.

The second is that he has not comprehended the rules of the ultimate dimension, but the realm of the rules of the highest dimension is not low, and he has also mastered a lot of ultimate dimensional killing moves.

The weakest is the Void Immortal Realm Lord, who has only mastered one ultimate dimensional killing move, and he doesn't dare to wander in the sea of dimensions.

Similarly, Ye Tian's current strength is also very weak.

However, the largest number in the Sea of Dimensions was also the Nine Realm Peak like them, who only mastered one or two ultimate dimensional killing moves.

"I'm not in a hurry to break into the sea of dimensions now, so I'll silently comprehend in the Void Heaven Palace, and continue to raise the rules of the supreme dimension first. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out the stone tablet from the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth.

This stele is indeed very valuable, but it is a pity that it is not as good as the Void Heaven Stele, and it is no problem to leave it to the human race as the treasure of the Zhen clan.

Time flies.

Long years have passed.

In the blink of an eye, 100 million domain yuan years have passed.

This is also the longest time Ye Tian has been in retreat, and after such a long time, he still only raised the supreme dimensional rules to two hundred and one dimensional rules, and it is too difficult to continue to improve.

He was very skeptical, how did the other Nine Realm Peaks comprehend the rules of the Ultimate Dimension?

......

Terran.

After such a long period of time, the human race has given birth to many extradimensional realms of the eighth realm, and his wife and children have also stepped into the eighth realm.

Especially his son Ye Xingchen, who is now on the verge of impacting the Ninth Realm.

And with the help of the stone tablet from the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, Ye Xingchen also successfully comprehended the rules of the supreme dimension.

As long as Ye Xingchen's foundation is more stable, he can assist Ye Xingchen in attacking the Ninth Realm.

After another period of time, Ye Xingchen almost stabilized his foundation, and then with the help of Ye Tian, he began to attack the Ninth Realm.

This breakthrough was very smooth, and Ye Xingchen successfully stepped into the ninth realm, which was also the second ninth realm of the human race.

"The stars have broken through to the ninth realm, and I should almost descend to the second dimensional heaven and earth, so as to create more ultimate dimensional killing moves!"

Ye Tian had already thought about the second dimension of Heaven and Earth, and he decided to go to the Secret Heaven and Earth.

Once he created an Ultimate Dimensional Peerless Sect from the Secret Realm, it would be very helpful to his strength, and it would be easier to kill the enemy.

......

Void Heaven Palace.

0 for flowers0

Ye Tian is ready to use the Void Sky Roulette to carry out the second advent dimension heaven and earth, and the second time requires a fee, the cost is not high, a hundred contribution points are enough.

So, after Ye Tian paid, the second advent began.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, you are going to descend to the Strange Realm Heaven and Earth, are you sure?"

"Confirm!"

"It's locking the world of the Mysterious Domain, and it's about to come to consciousness!"

All of Ye Tian's copied bodies fell into a deep sleep, and his consciousness was sent into the Secret Heaven and Earth by the Void Sky Roulette.

Strange world.

Inside a city shrouded in gray mist, inside a small room, Ye Tian opened his eyes.

At this time, he descended on an eight-year-old child, who was very hungry at this time.

"This body is too weak!"

"And it's an eight-year-old child, and it's not good luck this time!"

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

Immediately, he got up and searched for a while at home, only to find a few pancakes that had been sitting for an unknown number of days.

In order to restore his strength, he also ate it, and then controlled his body to squirm his stomach and quickly consume the energy of this pancake to recover his strength.

"According to the records of the Void Heaven Palace, the advent of the Secret Heaven and Earth is the most likely to fall, and many Nine Realm Peaks choose the Secret Heaven and Earth, and they can't grow up after 100,000 times. Ye Tian thought to himself.

But I have to admit that the ultimate dimensional killing moves created by this dimensional heaven and earth are indeed powerful, otherwise, there will not be many Nine Realms peaks who want to descend here.

According to the eight-year-old child's memory, his parents had been away for several days and had not returned, in which case it was most likely dead.

And it's hard for an eight-year-old child to survive here.

The Secret Realm is full of all kinds of evil forces, and the killing is too frequent.

However, as long as he is careful, as long as he gets through the most difficult period, he will be sure to live.

"The first goal, to live!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Later, he searched the house, still found a little money, and then went to the street and bought a little food.

And he also touched other people, and the copying talent can still be used, but it is suppressed just like the Shenwei Heaven and Earth at that time.

However, when he touched others, he still copied an intermediate tricky talent four.
